description_long: This combat tactical vehicle features a robust, angular body with a matte ochre finish and numerous armored panels covering its exterior. The front is equipped with reinforced grilles, a large windshield, and visible headlights, while the sides display intricate paneling, hatches, and heavy-duty wheels. The roof is detailed with multiple hatches, vents, and what appear to be missile pods or launchers at the rear. The rear section is heavily armored, with prominent exhausts and additional grilles, suggesting enhanced protection and engine cooling. The vehicle's design emphasizes durability and combat readiness, with visible weapon mounts and reinforced surfaces. Its overall appearance is utilitarian, with a focus on function over aesthetics, suitable for urban tactical operations.
description: A heavily armored, ochre-colored combat tactical vehicle with reinforced panels, heavy-duty wheels, and visible weapon mounts. Its angular design and detailed surface features emphasize durability and combat readiness.
description_view_0: Front view shows the reinforced grille, large windshield, headlights, and angular armored panels.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the detailed paneling, hatches, and two large wheels, with visible roof and rear weapon mounts.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the prominent exhausts, rear grilles, and a cluster of missile pods or launchers on the roof.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing paneling, hatches, wheels, and the rear-mounted weapon system.
attribute_weapon_mounts: One large missile launcher pod on the rear roof, with multiple launch tubes visible; no other weapon mounts are apparent.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body coverage with thick, angular armor plating; reinforced panels on the front, sides, and rear; sloped surfaces for deflection.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: Solid ochre color with no visible camouflage pattern.
attribute_tire_type: Four large, heavy-duty tires with deep all-terrain tread pattern; reinforced sidewalls.
